.chips--outlined:not(.chips--outlined.ch: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-5) 80%, transparent) ⇒ dark:color-mix(in srgb, #1d293d 80%, transparent)
.divider--secondary :: background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #f2f5f8, #f2f5f8 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px) ⇒ dark:repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #1d293d, #1d293d 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px)
.divider--secondary.divider--grey :: bac: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #e1e4ea, #e1e4ea 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px) ⇒ dark:repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #364152, #364152 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px)
.divider--secondary.divider--grey.divide: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #e1e4ea, #e1e4ea 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px) ⇒ dark:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #364152, #364152 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px)
.divider--secondary.divider--vertical ::: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #f2f5f8, #f2f5f8 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px) ⇒ dark:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #1d293d, #1d293d 4px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px)
.popover--bottom-center:after :: border-: transparent transparent #fefefe transparent ⇒ dark:transparent transparent #050505 transparent
.popover--bottom-left:after :: border-co: transparent transparent #fefefe transparent ⇒ dark:transparent transparent #050505 transparent
.popover--bottom-right:after :: border-c: transparent transparent #fefefe transparent ⇒ dark:transparent transparent #050505 transparent
.popover--middle-left:after :: border-co: transparent transparent transparent #fefefe ⇒ dark:transparent transparent transparent #050505
.popover--middle-right:after :: border-c: transparent #fefefe transparent transparent ⇒ dark:transparent #050505 transparent transparent
.popover--top-center:after :: border-col: #fefefe transparent transparent transparent ⇒ dark:#050505 transparent transparent transparent
.popover--top-left:after :: border-color: #fefefe transparent transparent transparent ⇒ dark:#050505 transparent transparent transparent
.popover--top-right:after :: border-colo: #fefefe transparent transparent transparent ⇒ dark:#050505 transparent transparent transparent
.skeleton--anim-wave::after :: backgroun: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6), transparent) ⇒ dark:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), transparent)
.tooltip--bottom-center:after :: border-: transparent transparent #fefefe transparent ⇒ dark:transparent transparent #050505 transparent
.tooltip--bottom-left:after :: border-co: transparent transparent #fefefe transparent ⇒ dark:transparent transparent #050505 transparent
.tooltip--bottom-right:after :: border-c: transparent transparent #fefefe transparent ⇒ dark:transparent transparent #050505 transparent
.tooltip--middle-left:after :: border-co: transparent transparent transparent #fefefe ⇒ dark:transparent transparent transparent #050505
.tooltip--middle-right:after :: border-c: transparent #fefefe transparent transparent ⇒ dark:transparent #050505 transparent transparent
.tooltip--top-center:after :: border-col: #fefefe transparent transparent transparent ⇒ dark:#050505 transparent transparent transparent
.tooltip--top-left:after :: border-color: #fefefe transparent transparent transparent ⇒ dark:#050505 transparent transparent transparent
.tooltip--top-right:after :: border-colo: #fefefe transparent transparent transparent ⇒ dark:#050505 transparent transparent transparent
